title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Naukri Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Naukri Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Naukri Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Naukri Digital Technologies:
Naukri Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri Digital Technologies!
